name: Shooting Challenge - DEV - Upload Engine - Lambda - v1
description: C-013 DEV sanitized Make scenario reference. Video route proven; homework_completion (070a) route added for overnight T2. Recreate or patch in Make UI. No webhook URLs or secrets included.

hardStops: DEV only — never point at PROD base appn84sqPw03zEbTT
Do not enable Airtable 070a/070b until manual webhook PASS + Mike approval
Do not commit webhook URLs or upload secrets
Do not begin C-023 implementation in this scenario

scenarioVariables.name: UPLOAD_WEBHOOK_SECRET_DEV
scenarioVariables.description: Same value as DEV Lambda UPLOAD_WEBHOOK_SECRET

scenarioVariables.name: MAKE_DEV_UPLOAD_WEBHOOK_URL
scenarioVariables.description: Custom webhook URL from module 1; local ops / tools/airtable/.env only

modules.purpose: Receives 070a/070b minimal JSON (manual Run once or automation)
Accept proven video route and new homework route; reject everything else

modules.body: Map entire JSON from module 1 unchanged
modules.structuredErrorContract: Do not stop the scenario on Lambda 4xx. Preserve complete Lambda JSON so structured errors reach the webhook response.
modules.purpose: Forward unchanged payload to DEV Lambda Function URL

branches.name: lambda_json
branches.condition: HTTP response body contains top-level actionOut (including structured Lambda error JSON)

branches.name: transport_error
branches.condition: No complete Lambda JSON body is available

lambdaJsonBranch.body: Map the complete parsed Lambda JSON body from module 3 without wrapping or renaming keys

modules.criticalRule: Prefer complete Lambda JSON. Plain-text Accepted is tolerated only if Airtable 070a/070c async path is live; for DEV manual smoke prefer full JSON.

lambdaStructuredErrorExample.reason: Airtable sender must evaluate complete Lambda error JSON

antiPatterns: Webhook response body = Accepted only (unless 070a async Accepted + 070c verify is intentional)
Wrapping Lambda JSON so actionOut is not at top level
Amazon S3 Upload module in Make
Reusing PROD webhook URL or PROD upload secret
Router that only allows 070b/video_feedback after homework route is enabled
mikeUiCreateDevScenarioFirst: CONFIRMED 2026-07-12: no separate DEV upload scenario exists in Make
ONLY live upload scenario is PROD: Shooting Challenge - GAME - Upload Engine - Lambda - v1 (webhook label C-013 PROD S3 Upload Webhook) — DO NOT EDIT IT
Create NEW scenario named Shooting Challenge - DEV - Upload Engine - Lambda - v1 from this blueprint (or clone PROD to a NEW scenario then immediately re-point all URLs/secrets to DEV)
Module 1 must be a NEW Custom webhook (e.g. label C-013 DEV S3 Upload Webhook) — never reuse the PROD webhook
Module 2 Router: include BOTH video_feedback/070b AND homework_completion/070a branches from the start
Module 3 HTTP POST → DEV Lambda Function URL + DEV X-Upload-Secret only
Keep scenario OFF for scheduling; use Run once for smoke
Confirm Lambda env ALLOW_ROUTE_KEYS includes homework_completion
Store new webhook as MAKE_DEV_UPLOAD_WEBHOOK_URL locally — never commit; never use PROD webhook URL
Do not paste Make webhook URL into Airtable 070a until smoke PASS + approval
mikeUiPatchFromVideoOnlyScenario: DEPRECATED assumption: DEV scenario already exists — superseded by mikeUiCreateDevScenarioFirst (2026-07-12)
If and only if DEV scenario already exists: add Module 2 homework branch; never patch PROD GAME scenario for overnight #8

flow.filter: (automationNumber = 070b AND routeKey = video_feedback) OR (automationNumber = 070a AND routeKey = homework_completion)

branches: complete Lambda JSON (success or structured Lambda error)

body.errorOut: Transport failure before complete Lambda JSON was available
